meta.description: Registry of data sources for the US facility pipeline

sources.name: Existing Hand-Curated Dataset (data_centers.json + ai_campuses.json)
sources.notes: Seed dataset from prior hand-curation. Treated as tier-2 confidence.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap (Overpass API)
sources.notes: Queries building=data_center, building=datacenter, man_made=data_center tags within continental US bounding box.

sources.name: DataCenterMap.com
sources.notes: Public directory; polite crawl at 1 req/2s. Robots.txt permits crawling.

sources.name: Cloudscene
sources.notes: Paid API. Set CLOUDSCENE_API_KEY to activate. Highest-trust aggregator.
